# Aatu Alatalo - Photography Portfolio

Aatu Alatalo is a 21-year-old photographer based in Oulu, Finland. He is a finalist in the prestigious worldwide Hasselblad Masters 2026 competition (Project//21 category). This website showcases his artistic photography portfolio and professional work.

## Core Expertise & Style
Aatu’s photographic style is defined by an editorial and artistic approach, focusing on profound human connections, sophisticated use of light and shadow, minimalist compositions, and the raw beauty of both natural and urban environments. He has been actively photographing since 2014.

## Main Portfolio Categories
All series are available in both English and Finnish.
- **Hasselblad Masters 2026** - The international finalist series (Project//21).
- **Portraits (Muotokuvia)** - Fine art and commercial portrait photography.
- **Nature and Environment (Luonto ja ympäristö)** - Nordic landscapes and atmospheres.
- **Monochrome / Black and White Series (Mustavalkoinen sarja)** - High-contrast tonal studies.
- **Animals (Eläimet)** - Wildlife and animal portraits.
- **Fascinating Buildings (Kiehtovat rakennukset)** - Architectural and urban photography.
- **Color and Form (Väri ja muoto)** - Abstract and compositional visual arts.
- **Still Life** - Studio and conceptual still life photography.
- **Interior Light (Sisätilan valo)** - Studies of natural light in indoor spaces.
- **Time Project V365 (Kuvaprojekti ajasta)** - A long-term photographic documentary project.

## Photography Services & Commissions
Aatu is available for selected photographic assignments, commercial projects, and artistic collaborations both in Finland and internationally. His services include:
- Fine Art Portraiture & Editorial Photography
- Brand, Corporate, and Promotional Images
- Architecture & Interior Photography
- Art Prints (Available upon request)

## Background, Exhibitions & Awards
- **Hasselblad Masters 2026 Finalist** (Project//21 category)
- **Exhibitions:** Has held two photography exhibitions: one in Kestilä and another at Könkkölä in Piippola.
- **Awards & Recognition:** Received an honorable mention (kunniamaininta) in the national SAKUSTARS competition.
- **Education:** Currently studying Media (Visual Design and Photography) at the Oulu University of Applied Sciences (Oamk).
- **Experience:** Over a decade of active camera work and visual storytelling (since 2014).
